pull_request.title: feat: add C/C++ language support
pull_request.body:
## Summary

- Add `tree-sitter-c` and `tree-sitter-cpp` grammars for parsing C and C++ source files
- C extraction: functions, structs, enums, unions, typedefs, `#include` directives, and call expressions (including `->` member calls)
- C++ extraction: classes, namespaces, structs, inline and out-of-line methods (with `Class::method` resolution), templates, and all C features
- Supported extensions: `.c`, `.h` (C), `.cpp`, `.cc`, `.cxx`, `.c++`, `.hpp`, `.hxx`, `.hh`, `.h++` (C++)

## Test plan

- [x] 11 new unit tests for C/C++ parsing (functions, structs, typedefs, enums, includes, calls, classes, namespaces, out-of-line methods, struct methods)
- [x] 11 new integration tests across `c_project` and `cpp_project` fixtures
- [x] 2 new language detection tests for C and C++ extensions
- [x] All 206 unit tests + 82 integration tests pass
- [x] Clippy clean, formatted

commit_summaries.message:
feat: add C/C++ language support with tree-sitter parsing

Add tree-sitter-c and tree-sitter-cpp grammars for parsing C and C++
source files. Extracts functions, structs, enums, typedefs, unions,
includes, and call expressions for C. Additionally extracts classes,
namespaces, methods (inline and out-of-line), and templates for C++.

Supported extensions: .c, .h (C), .cpp, .cc, .cxx, .c++, .hpp, .hxx,
.hh, .h++ (C++).

fix: correct C++ symbol classification for qualified names and anonymous namespaces

- Classify qualified free functions (e.g. util::log) as functions, not methods,
  by checking whether the scope segment is a known class/struct or namespace
- Use rightmost scope segment for class parent lookup so auth::AuthService::authenticate
  resolves to AuthService instead of auth
- Recurse into anonymous namespace bodies to index their symbols and calls
- Capture qualified callees (std::move, ns::foo, Type::static_fn) in call extraction
docs: add C/C++ to supported languages in README
chore: fix rustfmt formatting in C++ symbol classification
